title: Support consecutive repetition [*N:M], [+], and [*] in sequence expressions

features.name: consecutive repetition range [*N:M] in sequence expression
features.description: Code should include a consecutive repetition with range [*N:M] as the leading element of a sequence expression with ##1 delay

features.name: one-or-more repetition [+] in sequence expression
features.description: Code should include a one-or-more consecutive repetition [+] as the leading element of a sequence expression with ##1 delay

features.name: zero-or-more repetition [*] in sequence expression
features.description: Code should include a zero-or-more consecutive repetition [*] as the leading element of a sequence expression with ##1 delay
